_meta.purpose: Registry of VERIFIED post-training-cutoff facts. Every model working this repo has a knowledge cutoff BEFORE the 2026 league year. Entries here are ground truth: they OUTRANK any model's priors. Authority order: (1) these layers, (2) fresh web search to confirm/extend, (3) model priors — never authoritative for 2026 facts. If your knowledge contradicts an entry: assume YOU are stale, search to confirm, and if a genuine conflict survives, FLAG it to the user. Never silently withhold, 'correct', or re-derive a registered fact. Case law: PLAYBOOK.md C6/C7.
_meta.enforced_by: integration_audit.py Check I (existence, consumption, forbidden-claim scan)
_meta.surfaces_note: meta-layer consumed by integration_audit.py; exempt from surface declarations

entries.asserts: TRUE posted look-ahead Vegas O/U, implied totals and spreads for all 2026 regular-season games (18 weeks x 32 teams). These are real market numbers, not a model projection.
entries.provenance: ffdataroma draft-guide export (pulls posted look-ahead lines); user cross-checked against a sportsbook screenshot shared on Twitter/X.
entries.verified_by: user attestation, 2026-07-03 session ('that preseason vegas odds are true vegas odds... we also get it from a twitter picture as well')
entries.note: A prior deliverable mis-labeled this file as a power-rating projection. The forbidden_claims scan exists so that specific mistake can never ship again.

entries.asserts: 2026 offensive-coordinator hires per team (oc_new/oc_name), CBS-sourced with per-entry verified flags.
entries.verified_by: in-file verified:true flags; re-confirmed 2026-07-03 via nfl.com / giants.com / baltimoreravens.com searches

entries.asserts: The full verified 2026 coaching carousel, team by team: new OCs, new DCs with quantified scheme priors (man%/sack%), and offensive lean shifts. Includes the HC moves a pre-2026 model will not know: John Harbaugh (HC, NYG) with OC Matt Nagy; Jesse Minter (HC, BAL) with OC Declan Doyle; Todd Monken (HC, CLE); Klint Kubiak (HC, LV); Mike LaFleur (HC, ARI); Mike McDaniel (OC, LAC); Mike McCarthy (HC, PIT); Kevin Stefanski (HC, ATL).
entries.provenance: CBS Sports 2026 coordinator hires (verified); HC moves re-confirmed 2026-07-03 via giants.com/news/john-harbaugh-hired-head-coach-new-york-giants-nfl, baltimoreravens.com/news/ravens-announce-2026-coaching-staff, baltimoresun.com 2026/06/24 Monken-Browns exclusive, chargers.com/news/mike-mcdaniel-offensive-coordinator-hire, sports.yahoo.com 'full list of 10 new NFL head coach hires 2026'.
entries.verified_by: web re-confirmation 2026-07-03 (this session); companion detail files: COACHING_CHANGES_2026_DETAIL.md, COACHING_CHANGES_2026_PLAYCALLERS.md
forbidden_claims: coaching carousel that can't be verified
entries.note: A prior session WITHHELD these facts from a report because they contradicted its stale priors. That is the exact inversion the Prime Rule forbids.

entries.asserts: 2026 offensive identities per team (pace, pass rate, run scheme, motion, PA, environment) with coaching-carousel-aware outlook text (playcaller, adds/losses).
entries.provenance: built by build_offense_profile.py from verified coaching + roster layers
entries.verified_by: carousel facts cross-checked against COACHING_CHANGES_2026.md and coordinator_changes_2026.json
entries.note: The outlook HC/OC names are REAL 2026 facts, not scrambled data.

entries.asserts: Verified 2026 roster/injury/availability flags (single edit point for injuries, FAs, non-usable players).
entries.provenance: assembled from verified roster moves; cross-source reconciliation in audit_roster_moves.py -> ROSTER_MOVES_2026.md
entries.verified_by: audit_roster_moves.py data-side gate (real move = all sources agree)
entries.note: Re-verify before drafting; roster reality moves with camp news.
